title: ranunculus marginatus var. trachycarpus
intro: Ranunculus marginatus var. trachycarpus, also known as Trailing Buttercup, is a plant species within the Ranunculus genus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include relief from fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of kidney problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the Trailing Buttercup plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
